hooks.name: The Bold Claim
examples: The platform just made a job disappear.
AI just killed the production studio.

hooks.name: The Personal Failure
examples: I fired my Excel sheet.
I made my developer cry.

hooks.name: The Dialogue Drop
examples: Vinod called. "I'm tired."
Victor my co-founder called me last Tuesday. "I just spent four hours pulling data."

hooks.name: The Contrarian Question
examples: Haven't you built an AI agent yet?
When was your last tool audit?

hooks.name: The Action Declaration
examples: We removed all the dropdown filters.
We killed the feature nobody used.

hooks.name: The Crisis Opener
examples: Yesterday, our tool died.
Yesterday, Victor lost a client's data.

hooks.name: The Why Statement
examples: Why I love Reddit for validation.
Why I stopped chasing features.

hooks.name: The How Declaration
examples: How I built with my buddies to win.

hooks.name: The Number Hook
examples: I asked 12 agency owners about their tool stack. 11 of them sighed.

hooks.name: The Scene Setter
examples: Just came back from walking my dog Bumi on the beach.

hooks.name: The Confession
hooks.structure: I [thought/believed/was sure] [wrong thing]. I was wrong.
examples: I thought more features meant better product. I was wrong.

hooks.name: The Industry Truth
hooks.structure: [Industry group] don't [what everyone thinks]. They [what they actually do].
examples: Agency owners don't need more features. They need fewer tabs open.

hooks.name: The Time Reveal
hooks.structure: [Person] spent [shocking amount of time] on [mundane task].
examples: Four hours. For one client report.

hooks.name: The One Word Disruptor
examples: More options, more control. Right? Wrong.

hooks.name: The Permission Slip
hooks.structure: You don't need [what everyone says you need].
examples: You don't need another tool. You need fewer tools that do more.

hooks.name: The Tool Breakup
examples: I cancelled three tools last month. Nobody noticed.

hooks.name: The Cost of Inaction
examples: Every Monday, media buyers lose 4 hours to manual reporting.

hooks.name: The Realization Moment
examples: The day I talked to Claude Co-Work, I was almost crying.

hooks.name: The Insider Quote
examples: "This tool is killing my Monday mornings." Found that on Reddit at 2 AM.

hooks.name: The Age Card
hooks.structure: I'm [age], and I [unexpected thing for that age].
examples: Brother, I'm 50, and I can't even spell an email right without Grammarly.

hooks.name: The Before/After
examples: Six months ago: Excel sheets, 4 dashboards, manual reports. Now: one question to the AI.

hooks.name: The Myth Buster
examples: More data means better decisions is a lie.

hooks.name: The Unpopular Take
hooks.structure: Unpopular take: [opinion nobody wants to hear].
examples: Unpopular take: most agency dashboards create more work than they solve.

hooks.name: The Discovery
hooks.structure: [Tool/thing] dropped and I lost my mind.
examples: Seedance 2.0 dropped and I lost my mind.

hooks.name: The Simple Truth
examples: Agency reporting in 5 words: too many tabs open.
